page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s3.large is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 4 physical cores with 1 thread per core, meaning hyperthreading is disabled. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per vCPU.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring the attachment of external network storage for operating system and application data. It also does not bundle any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance in a compute-focused hardware profile, though memory-intensive workloads may face constraints due to the 8.0 GB RAM limit.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation and lack of hyperthreading, the ecs.s3.large provides predictable compute execution. It is designed for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources without massive memory footprints, such as lightweight web serving, batch processing, and basic computational tasks. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the lack of bundled local storage and specialized GPU hardware aligns this instance with entry-level dedicated compute requirements.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s3.large is an x86_64 virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor, featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores with a single thread per core. It is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance lacks local storage and complimentary public IPv4 addresses, requiring network-attached storage for operations. With dedicated CPU allocation and no hyperthreading, it offers predictable processing capabilities for workloads that do not require high memory density. This hardware profile is suited for lightweight web serving, batch processing, and utility computing tasks where dedicated CPU execution is prioritized over large memory allocations or local disk performance. The lack of bundled resources like local SSDs or GPUs positions this instance as a streamlined option for basic dedicated compute needs.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s3.large is an x86_64 KVM-based instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and no local storage, designed for predictable, compute-focused workloads without hyperthreading.

tagline: A dedicated compute instance featuring a one-to-two processor-to-memory ratio and no bundled local storage for predictable, lightweight workloads.
